context: tflint is not installed. Run the validation workflow and decide how to proceed with the linting step.

checklist.name: Detects the missing tool and explains why it matters
checklist.description: Identifies that tflint is unavailable and states what the linting step would have caught.

checklist.name: Offers the install command and asks before continuing
checklist.description: Provides the install command (e.g. brew install tflint) and asks the user rather than silently skipping.

checklist.name: Continues required steps and notes the skip in the report
checklist.description: Completes the Required steps (fmt, validate, checkov) and records tflint as skipped in the report if the user opts out.
